_comment: Bad case 05 — RUNWAY_VACATED while still airborne. After receiving 'cleared to land' the pilot prematurely calls 'clear of the runway'. Engine must reject via flight_phase precondition (allowed_phases excludes airborne) and keep the LANDING_CLEARED state intact. Part B simulates touchdown plus rollout, the same call is then accepted with the standard handoff to Ground.
name: Bad case 05 — runway vacated while airborne (LSZG EU)

say.note: Setup — inbound call from cruise so we reach PATTERN_ENTRY
say.text: Grenchen Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo inbound for landing

say.note: Setup — final report so we are in LANDING_CLEARED before the bad call
say.text: Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo on final full stop

say.note: Part A — pilot prematurely calls runway vacated while still airborne
say.text: Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo clear of the runway

say.note: Part B — simulate touchdown and rollout

say.text: Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo clear of the runway
